assistant-chat.select_conversation: Select a conversation from the list, or start a new one.
assistant-chat.empty_conversation: Say hi — the assistant can read, edit, or summarise your files.
assistant-chat.thinking_gerunds: Thinking | Pondering | Reasoning | Cogitating | Mulling | Percolating | Reflecting | Deliberating | Brewing | Noodling
assistant-chat.delete_confirm_text: "{{title}}" will be removed from this provider's history.
assistant-chat.auto_accept_help: Skip the confirmation dialog for edit / write / create / replace tool calls in this conversation. Read-class tools always auto-execute.
assistant-chat.share_active_file_help: Attach the currently-open file to every send in this conversation. The agent sees the latest in-editor content.
assistant-chat.share_selection_help: Attach the current editor selection (with line range) to every send. Off by default to avoid accidentally over-sharing.

assistant-settings.web_warning: API keys you enter here are stored in this browser's localStorage. Any script that runs on this page can read them. Use the desktop build for stronger key isolation.
assistant-settings.encryption_unavailable: OS keychain encryption is not available on this machine. Anthropic and OpenAI are disabled until safeStorage becomes available; Ollama (local) is unaffected.
assistant-settings.api_key_placeholder_saved: (saved — paste a new key to replace)
assistant-settings.ollama_tool_support_hint: Tool-call quality varies between Ollama models. If the assistant hallucinates tool calls or can't reliably read/edit files, try a model with stronger tool support — llama3.1, qwen2.5 and mistral-nemo are reliable choices.
assistant-settings.error_model_unsupported_tools: This model doesn't support tool calls. Try a model that does (e.g. llama3.1 or qwen2.5).

assistant-tools.confirm_intro: The assistant wants to run this tool. Review the change before accepting.
assistant-tools.error_rejected: The user declined this tool call.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.no_providers_enabled: No providers connected yet. Enable one in Settings to start chatting.
assistant.provider_ready_placeholder: {{provider}} is ready — chat UI lands in the next phase.

modals-about.libraries_intro: MKEditor uses the following open-source libraries:
modals-about.libraries_list: monaco, react, tailwind, markdown-it, highlight.js, webpack and electron.

modals-export.title: Export settings
modals-export.intro: Here you can configure settings for HTML and PDF exports, settings are automatically saved as they are updated.
modals-export.settings_file_info: Your settings file is located at ~/.mkeditor/settings.json.
modals-export.export_with_styles_help: Enable this to export with Highlight.js and KaTeX styles, provided from official CDNs with secure integrity and crossorigin checks.
modals-export.set_container_help: Set the container width class, fluid is larger width.
modals-export.set_font_size_help: Set the font size in px.

modals-settings.title: Editor Settings
modals-settings.intro: Here you can customize various editor settings according to your preferences, settings are automatically saved as they are updated.
modals-settings.intro_assistant: Connect your AI provider accounts, pick default models, and test connectivity. Keys are stored locally and never leave your machine.
modals-settings.settings_file_info: Your settings file is located at
modals-settings.settings_file_info_assistant: Your AI provider config and conversations are stored at
modals-settings.autoindent_help: Automatically indent text on new lines.
modals-settings.wordwrap_help: Automatically break lines to fit the width of the editor.
modals-settings.scrollsync_help: Enable scroll sync between the editor and the preview.
modals-settings.session_restore_help: Reopen your previous tabs, workspace folder, and cursor positions when MKEditor starts.
modals-settings.clear_session_help: Wipes the persisted session file. Currently open tabs stay open; the next launch starts fresh.
modals-settings.clear_session_confirm_text: This wipes the persisted session file. Currently open tabs stay open; the next launch will start fresh.
modals-settings.systemtheme_help: Let your system theme override your stored settings.

items.insert_link: Insert a link (selection or empty selection)
items.insert_markdown_table: Insert a markdown table (opens the configuration menu)
items.insert_codeblock: Insert a codeblock (_ = the underlined letter from the menu)
items.insert_alert_block: Insert an alert block (_ = the underlined letter from the menu)
items.select_all_occurrences: Select all occurrences of find match
items.insert_cursor_end_each_line: Insert cursor at end of each line selected
items.select_all_occurrences_current_word: Select all occurrences of current word

modals-unsaved.title: Unsaved changes
modals-unsaved.text: Save changes to your file before closing?
modals-unsaved.workspace_switch_text: Switching workspace will close every open tab. You have unsaved changes in {{count}} tab(s). What would you like to do?

navbar.theme_switch_notice: This switch is disabled on desktop if you are using your system theme.

notifications.generic_error_try_again: An error has occurred, please try again.
notifications.settings_file_corrupted_reset: Settings file corrupted. Returning to default settings.
notifications.unable_save_settings_permission_denied: Unable to save settings: permission denied.
notifications.unable_save_settings_unknown_error: Unable to save settings: unknown error.
notifications.update_available: Update {{version}} is available, downloading in the background...
notifications.update_downloaded: Update {{version}} has been downloaded, restart to update.
notifications.session_file_missing: Some previously open files were not found and have been skipped: {{files}}

sidebar.chromium_only_warning: Folder access is only available in Chromium-based browsers (Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera).
